title: Add examples for Cobra
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

First pass of entries for the Examples listed in the Cobra Help.  Will add others in following PR's.

LGTM, @TomSweeneyRedHat Fix up the comments above and we can merge, REMOVE WIP
@jwhonce I hopefully addressed your concerns, if not, let's chat.
Late to the game, but wanted to drop that I really like this PR :+1: It's really cool to see those examples, especially for complex commands.
